meta.title: AI for Good Specialization: Learn AI's role in addressing real-world challenges
meta.description:
Enroll today: https://bit.ly/3ExuP93 

In AI for Good, our latest three-course specialization, you’ll be empowered to identify, scope, and build impactful AI projects.

This specialization is for anyone who wants to understand how AI can be used to address social and environmental challenges. Whether you’re a seasoned programmer or someone experienced in handling data through spreadsheets, but lacking prior AI or coding experience, this program is for you.

Throughout the courses, you will:

- Learn how to apply a step-by-step framework in the development of AI projects
- Analyze data and build AI models for projects focused on air quality, wind energy, biodiversity monitoring, and disaster management
- Explore real-world case studies related to public health, climate change, and disaster management, to understand how organizations around the world are using AI to help their initiatives

While this specialization is focused on AI for Good applications, the knowledge you’ll gain will be applicable to any AI project you work on in the future, in industry, academia, or elsewhere as a non-technical product/project owner or as a technical engineer or analyst. 

Learn more: https://bit.ly/3ExuP93
